subject: Ariados, a dark spider Pokemon with a large round abdomen bearing a face-like marking and long pointed legs
description: A large spider Pokemon with a dark body occupies the center of the composition, its round abdomen prominently displaying a face-like pattern. The creature has multiple long, angular legs and pointed head protrusions suggesting antennae or fangs. The background is deep purple-indigo, evoking nighttime or a shadowy forest setting. A reddish-orange stripe or marking is visible on the body. The overall mood is dark and predatory.
